queries.query: What's the status?
queries.rationale: Appendix A seed; canonical status query.

queries.query: Show me the project pulse
queries.rationale: Appendix A seed; 'project pulse' is arc-status's own description verb.

queries.query: Quick overview before standup
queries.rationale: Appendix A seed; read-only overview request.

queries.query: How are we doing across the pipeline right now?
queries.rationale: Informal phrasing — 'how are we doing' is adjacent to status pulse.

queries.query: Give me the 30-second read on the project
queries.rationale: Informal phrasing — '30-second read' maps to quick snapshot.

queries.query: Where are we at on the current wave?
queries.rationale: Informal phrasing — 'where are we at' is status intent.

queries.query: Summarize backlog, wave, and in-flight specs in one view
queries.rationale: Status surface — the five-dimension inline snapshot.

queries.query: What should I work on next?
queries.rationale: Status surface — arc-status emits a next-step recommendation.

queries.query: Is there an active wave right now?
queries.rationale: Status surface — read-only wave-active query.

queries.query: Tell me the recent activity and git momentum on this project
queries.rationale: Status surface — git momentum is one of the five status dimensions.

queries.query: Audit the pipeline and fix issues
queries.rationale: Near-miss routes to arc-audit (Appendix A); writes a report and offers fixes.

queries.query: Update the README
queries.rationale: Near-miss routes to arc-sync (Appendix A); README management.

queries.query: Audit the pipeline for stale ideas
queries.rationale: Near-miss routes to arc-audit; diagnostic sweep despite shared 'pipeline' keyword.

queries.query: Check brief completeness across the shaped ideas
queries.rationale: Near-miss routes to arc-audit; brief-completeness is one of its 10 dimensions.

queries.query: Capture a new idea — status dashboard widget
queries.rationale: Routes to arc-capture; raw entry despite the word 'status'.

queries.query: Shape the 'status page' idea into a spec-ready brief
queries.rationale: Routes to arc-shape; refinement despite the word 'status'.

queries.query: Plan the next wave
queries.rationale: Routes to arc-wave; forward planning.

queries.query: Ship the completed ideas from the current wave
queries.rationale: Routes to arc-ship; lifecycle completion.

queries.query: Check the CI build status
queries.rationale: Out-of-domain; CI/CD status, not product pipeline status.

queries.query: What's the weather today?
queries.rationale: Out-of-domain; unrelated small talk.
